# atlassian_jira_issue_type (Resource)

Manages a Jira Cloud issue type.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "atlassian_jira_issue_type" "example" {
  name = "Example Issue Type"
  type = "standard"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the issue type.
- `type` (String) The type of issue type. Must be "standard" or "subtask". Changing this forces recreation of the resource.

### Optional

- `avatar_id` (Number) The ID of the avatar for the issue type.
- `description` (String) The description of the issue type.

### Read-Only

- `hierarchy_level` (Number) The hierarchy level of the issue type, set by Jira based on the type.
- `id` (String) The ID of the issue type.
